falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong trend continuation would contradict the blowoff scenario and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume would indicate increased buying pressure, refuting the blowoff exhaustion thesis.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 60% as measured by the system's algorithm
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical bottom_2022_may_luna pattern would invalidate the current pattern-based verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
